overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing exploration of the Sanctuary of Delphi and discovery of the Kastalian Fountain. The character walks through ancient Greek ruins and autumn landscapes during golden hour, passing crowds of NPCs before reaching a sacred waterfall grotto.

scene_state.functional_zone: sanctuary entrance with classical stone gate

events.description: camera pans right to view the stone wall and canopy structure
camera pans back left toward the sanctuary gate

agents.ego_description: standing near the sanctuary entrance, rotating camera to survey the surroundings and architecture

notable_agents.action: group of robed figures standing near the large stone statues
figures walking through the sanctuary gate

entered.detail: large stone gate with triangular pediment and green fabric drapes
tall classical human statues flanking the entrance
ancient stone wall with fabric canopy awning
tall thin evergreen trees behind the statues

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at the Sanctuary of Delphi entrance, featuring a grand stone gate with green drapes and classical statues. The camera pans right to reveal a stone wall with fabric canopies, then returns to face the gate. Groups of robed NPCs gather near the entrance, and the warm golden hour light bathes the ancient architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt pilgrimage path along rocky cliff

events.description: leaves the sanctuary entrance and begins walking along the open trail
continues along the winding path, navigating through groups of pilgrims

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt path away from the sanctuary, passing other pilgrims and animals

notable_agents.action: group of robed pilgrims walking along the path in the same direction
small pig or boar crossing the dirt path

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through tall dry grass
large limestone cliff face lining the left side of the path
deciduous trees with orange and red autumn foliage

segments.scene_description: The character moves away from the sanctuary onto an open dirt trail winding along a rocky cliff. The path is populated with groups of robed pilgrims walking in the same direction, and small animals cross the trail. Autumn-colored trees line the right side while the cliff face dominates the left, with distant mountains visible under the golden sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding rocky trail through autumn forest

events.description: approaching the stone archway entrance carved into the rock face

agents.ego_description: walking through the rocky autumn landscape toward the sacred grove entrance

notable_agents.action: lone figure standing by the path observing the surroundings

entered.detail: ancient stone gateway with carved details set into the rock face
large boulders and rocky outcrops surrounding the path
evergreen trees growing on top of the cliff

segments.scene_description: The trail narrows and winds through rocky terrain with dense autumn foliage. The path becomes more enclosed by rock formations as the character approaches an ancient stone archway carved into the cliff face ahead. Fewer people are present in this secluded section, with only scattered individuals visible among the trees.

events.description: passes through the stone archway into the enclosed sacred space
UI notification appears: Historical Location Discovered - Kastalian Fountain

agents.ego_description: entering the sacred grove and approaching the fountain pool to explore the area

notable_agents.action: seated figure resting by the edge of the fountain pool

entered.detail: sacred pool with stone basin, floating flower petals, and waterfall backdrop
water cascading down the rock face into the pool below
bronze fire bowl burning near the pool edge
cut stone tiles surrounding the sacred pool

segments.scene_description: Passing through the stone archway, the scene opens into a sheltered sacred grotto featuring the Kastalian Fountain. A waterfall cascades down the rock face into a stone pool covered with floating flower petals, while a lit brazier burns nearby. The space is enclosed by stone walls and dense trees, creating a serene atmosphere. A discovery notification appears as the character explores the paved area around the ancient fountain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the bustling entrance of the Sanctuary of Delphi into the secluded serenity of a sacred grotto. It begins at a grand stone gate adorned with green drapes and classical statues, where the camera pans across fabric canopies and groups of robed NPCs bathed in warm golden hour light. As the character moves away from the architecture, the scene opens onto a winding dirt trail along a rocky cliff, passing pilgrims and autumn-colored trees under a bright sun. The path then narrows and becomes more enclosed by dense foliage and rock formations before leading the camera through an ancient stone archway carved into the cliff face. Finally, the environment shifts into a sheltered grotto featuring the Kastalian Fountain, where a waterfall cascades into a petal-covered pool beside a burning brazier.
